comment.body:
I can’t tell you what to do.  I can only tell you what I’m doing.  Let’s say I’m 48% cash, 49% equities, 3% hedged.  The only stocks I’m dipping my toes in right now are value stocks with lots of cash and very little debt on their balance sheet.  And I’m talking taking it slow.  1% here, and 1% there.

Alma retained her bearish outlook for the end of this month.  I’m not doing anything high beta before then.
